I KNOW shes dominant I just cant prove it

Anyways Zizzy x pony

_______________

Zizzy is a white zebra with a snout, a reddish-brown oval-shaped nose, dark brown nostrils and five horizontal, black stripes on her head. She wears a magenta dress, bright violet leggings, and a purple musketeer hat adorned with two long, pink feathers. She has a single, horizontal, black stripe on her left wrist and wields a fencing foil.
creator: Alessa_cutz
